name: Kaspa Covenant Game Kit
blurb: an SDK for 1v1 games with player-funded covenant escrow and on-chain settlement — the escrow contract verifies byte-identical on kascov

name: KaspaRocket
blurb: a memecoin launchpad on Kaspa covenants — every token page ships with a verify-on-kascov button, so anyone can check the coin against the chain itself
